case_title: GLOBIG, SUSANNE VS CAPLAN, MARLA MS. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY GLOBIG, SUSANNE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPLAN, MARLA MS. PROPERTY PROFESSIONALS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF. DECL; UNABLE TO SERVE DEFT. PLTF. TO RE-SET AND RESERVE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLOBIG, SUSANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPLAN, MARLA MS. PROPERTY PROFESSIONALS $596.35 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $695.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-21-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-02-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-21-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-16-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GLOBIG, SUSANNE PER REQUEST OF CROSS-COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-16-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-28-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE"TO ADVANCE"DATE T O ORIG.DTE OF 7/21/99 AT 8:30AM.PAID $10 CASH. (CAL:25-10);FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.
